item.title: Gurman on Tang Tan and Paul Meade 摘要
item.description:
Apple is suing former executive Tang Tan, accusing him of stealing trade secrets for his new AI startup. Bloomberg's Mark Gurman reports that Apple was alarmed by OpenAI's recruiting, which poached senior hardware and design leaders, including smart glasses chief Paul Meade in June 2025. Meade, who led Vision Pro hardware engineering for seven years, was immediately dismissed without a transition period. Tan, a 25-year Apple veteran known for risk-taking, is at the center of the lawsuit. The departures highlight tensions as AI companies aggressively hire Apple talent.
标签: Apple, OpenAI, lawsuit, trade secrets, poaching, AI, smart glasses, Vision Pro, recruiting, Bloomberg

item.title: ★ Exactly Like Om Malik 摘要
item.description:
A collection of tributes to tech journalist Om Malik, who recently passed away. Fred Vogelstein recounts how Om inspired him to start a newsletter about overlooked tech innovation. Joanna Stern, Casey Newton, Jim Nielsen, and others share personal stories of Om's generosity, mentorship, and persistence. Jason Hiner's book excerpt describes Om's relentless job pursuit at Forbes, where he left daily voicemails and faxes until hired. Andrew Sasaki recalls Om's thoughtful reply to a stranger, signing off with 'Exactly Like Om Malik.' The piece highlights Om's impact on tech journalism and his warm, determined character.
标签: Om Malik, tech journalism, tribute, mentorship, persistence, GigaOm, Forbes, blogging, tech industry, obituary

item.title: Progress on Gilbreath’s conjecture 摘要
item.description:
Gilbreath's conjecture, a simple yet notoriously difficult problem about prime numbers, has seen new progress via a random model developed by Terence Tao and coauthors. The model mimics the conjecture's behavior and is more amenable to analysis, providing heuristic plausibility. However, Tao notes that making the heuristics rigorous remains far beyond current mathematical techniques. The conjecture, which Paul Erdős speculated might take 200 years to prove, continues to resist solution due to its unusual nature.
标签: mathematics, number theory, Gilbreath conjecture, prime numbers, Terence Tao, random model, open problem, conjecture, heuristics

item.title: Benedict Evans on the New ‘Super App’ ChatGPT 摘要
item.description:
Benedict Evans criticizes the new ChatGPT 'super app' as a confusing, disorganized mess, reflecting OpenAI's internal chaos. He contrasts it with the focused old app, noting UI issues like unclear distinctions between projects, tasks, and chats, and a 'Setup' dickbar that persists for non-Slack/Google Drive users. Evans argues the app has a polished veneer but lacks coherence, attributing this to OpenAI's senior executives being consumed by FOMO over Anthropic and prioritizing AI research over product design.
标签: ChatGPT, OpenAI, UI/UX, product design, app review, software quality, organizational culture, tech criticism

item.title: OpenAI Help Center Describes What Is Wrong With the New ChatGPT 摘要
item.description:
OpenAI's Help Center describes the availability of Work and Codex features in ChatGPT. Work is accessible on web, mobile, and desktop app for eligible paid plans, with cloud-based conversations on web/mobile and local file support on desktop. Codex is exclusive to the desktop app, working with local development tools, and can be accessed remotely via mobile but does not sync as chat history. The author criticizes this fragmented experience as indicative of deeper issues with the new ChatGPT 'super' app.
标签: OpenAI, ChatGPT, Codex, Work, desktop app, mobile app, cloud, local files, fragmentation, user experience

item.title: Can Someone Explain to Me How to Get ‘ChatGPT Classic’? 摘要
item.description:
John Gruber criticizes OpenAI's confusing upgrade process from the old ChatGPT Mac app to the new 'super' app. The Help Center suggests a prompt to download the new app, but Gruber never saw it. Manually downloading the disk image and running it while the old app is running fails; only by quitting the old app first does the new one replace it, moving the old to Trash without creating a 'ChatGPT Classic' app. He notes the Help document's hedging language ('may install alongside') reflects confusion. For a billion-user app, this poor user experience is unacceptable.
标签: ChatGPT, OpenAI, Mac app, software update, user experience, app migration, desktop app, confusion, bug
